Has dated or been in a relationship with someone who was 10 or more years older or younger.
现在或曾经的伴侣，和你年龄相差 10 岁或以上。

Has traveled to another country mainly for a first date with someone you liked.
曾经为了和喜欢的人第一次约会，专门去过另一个国家。

Has ever rejected someone and later regretted it.
曾经拒绝过一个人，后来又后悔了。

Has met a romantic partner through a blind date or a setup arranged by others.
曾经通过相亲或别人介绍认识过恋爱对象。

Has hidden a relationship from family or close friends for more than a year.
曾经把一段关系瞒着家人或亲近朋友超过一年。

Has first met a romantic partner while traveling or on vacation.
曾经是在旅行或度假时第一次认识恋爱对象。

Has been in a relationship where the woman earned more than the man.
曾经有一段关系里，女生赚得比男生更多。

Has received a handwritten love letter as an adult.
成年后，收到过手写情书。

Has had a relationship begin because of a wrong message, wrong call, or accidental encounter online.
曾经因为发错消息、打错电话，或网络上的一次意外互动，开始过一段关系。
